stem: h(x) = 5x + 12. The function h gives the estimated height, in inches, of a bamboo plant x weeks after its height was first measured. Which statement is the best interpretation of 12 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The estimated height of the plant increased by 12 inches each week.
The estimated height of the plant was 12 inches when it was first measured.
The plant will be measured each week for 12 weeks.
The estimated maximum height of the plant is 12 inches.

rationale:
Choice B is correct. In h(x) = 5x + 12, the constant 12 is h(0), the height at x = 0 weeks — when the plant was first measured.

Choice A confuses the constant with the rate of change (5). Choices C and D do not match the meaning of the constant.
